page_content:
EDSP625 Evidence Based Practices for Individuals with Significant Disabilities (3 Credits)

Examine and apply empirical research aligned to current trends and areas of investigation in the field of students with significant support needs. Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department.

EDSP626 Characteristics of Infants and Young Children: Early Childhood Special Education (3 Credits)

Focus on developmental, behavioral, and learning characteristics of infants and young children with and without disabilities. Jointly offered with EDSP420.

Credit Only Granted for. EDSP420 or EDSP6 26.
